title: Downingtown Farmers Market at Kerr Park — March 14
summary: The Downingtown Farmers Market returns to Kerr Park on March 14 from 10 AM to noon with local vendors and fresh produce.
description:
The Downingtown Farmers Market is back at Kerr Park on Saturday, March 14 from 10 AM to noon. Local vendors bring fresh produce, baked goods, and artisan products to one of Downingtown's favorite community gathering spots.

Kerr Park is a Downingtown landmark, and the farmers market is one of the best ways to connect with your neighbors. If you're picking up groceries for an older parent or dropping off produce at their home, take a quick look at their bathroom while you're there. A missing grab bar is easy to overlook until it's too late.

title: Repair Cafe at Central Presbyterian Church — March 14
summary: Downingtown's Repair Cafe runs March 14 from 10 AM to 2 PM — bring broken items and local volunteers will fix them for free.
description:
Central Presbyterian Church in Downingtown hosts a Repair Cafe on Saturday, March 14 from 10 AM to 2 PM. Bring broken household items — small appliances, clothing, electronics — and local volunteers will repair them at no charge. It's a sustainability initiative that's been growing across Chester County.

The Repair Cafe fixes what's broken. So do we — except our specialty is bathroom safety. If you've got a loose grab bar, a shower that needs a safety handle, or a bathroom with no grab bars at all, that's our version of a repair job. And unlike the cafe, we come to you.

title: Succulent Workshop at Victory Brewing — March 20
summary: Build your own glass terrarium at Victory Brewing Company in Downingtown on March 20 at 6 PM.
description:
Victory Brewing Company in Downingtown hosts a Succulent Workshop on Friday, March 20 at 6 PM. Participants build their own large glass terrarium while enjoying Victory's craft beer selection. It's a creative night out in one of Downingtown's anchor businesses.

Victory Brewing has been a cornerstone of Downingtown's revitalization. The borough's mix of historic homes near the center and newer developments means bathroom layouts vary widely — but the need for grab bars is consistent across all of them.

title: Kids Free Trout Rodeo at Kerr Park — March 28
summary: Kids fish for free at the annual Trout Rodeo at Kerr Park on March 28, 9 AM to 2 PM.
description:
The annual Kids Free Trout Rodeo returns to Kerr Park on Saturday, March 28 from 9 AM to 2 PM. It's a Downingtown tradition — kids fish for free in the stocked stream while families enjoy a day outdoors.

Family traditions like the Trout Rodeo are what make Downingtown a great place to raise a family and grow old. If your parents or grandparents are still living in their Downingtown home, help them stay there safely. A grab bar beside the toilet and in the shower can mean the difference between independence and a hospital visit.
